title: 57 percent of the world’s population is exposed to climate-related hazards
subtitle: Share of population exposed to at least one climate-related hazard
visdescription: Share of population exposed to at least one climate hazard
textParagraph: Exposure to [emphasis: floods], [emphasis: agricultural droughts], [emphasis: cyclones ]and [emphasis: heatwaves ]depends on a country’s geographical location. In 44 countries, the whole population is exposed to at least one climate hazard.
scale_title: Percentage of population exposed to climate-related hazards
scale_title_pop: Total number of people exposed to climate-related hazards
scale_title_sha: Percentage of population exposed to climate effects
keyFactLabel: people are exposed to climate-related hazards
legend_title: Percentage of population exposed to climate effects
